shot_notes: The physical toll of starvation and dehydration sets in
evidence_summary: Establish the physical toll of a long-distance trek across an unforgiving landscape. The visual narrative must emphasize the scale of the mossy waste against the diminishing vitality of the travelers and their mounts to communicate mounting desperation.

The group travels northeast across a trackless mossy waste on thoats. They face starvation, dehydration, and exhaustion. During this trek, Woola joins the party, providing much-needed companionship and tracking ability.
The group moves northeast with purposeful momentum across the waste.
The group is visibly depleted, joined by Woola, moving with heavy exhaustion.
Traveling northeast through a trackless mossy waste while facing starvation and dehydration.
